# Canyon State Enterprises — robots.txt
# Sitemap is auto-generated from src/data/* by scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
# on every build (see package.json "prebuild").

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://canyonstateaz.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl directives — pages we don't want indexed or crawled
Disallow: /thank-you   # Form confirmation page (also marked noindex in <head>)
Disallow: /.netlify/   # Netlify functions endpoints (contact form POST etc.)
Disallow: /api/        # Reserved for any future API surface
Disallow: /*.json$     # Defense-in-depth against accidentally exposed JSON
